//: AppSail managed-runtime config for NETRA. Deploy from the REPO ROOT (source '.') so the @netra/core workspace package and data/seed resolve. The start launcher (apps/web/start.mjs) binds the AppSail-injected X_ZOHO_CATALYST_LISTEN_PORT. `catalyst appsail init` generates the authoritative file; confirm the stack value against your console (node16 baseline; node18/20 may be selectable).
